title: Warning: rushed send, scam risk high

actions.value: And note: If anyone is rushing you to send these coins for any reason at all, you could be at high risk of being involved in a scam. Please ask us anything or send over anything in question, and we'll help to verify and validate whatever you may be uncertain about.
